But, after a challenging first day of introducing his "unique" perspective and antics to Ryan, it's a surprise revelation from Andy Sr. that impresses him the most.

programme.title: The EDGE
programme.desc: Take a fearless journey into the wild, to the Edge. It is all about hunting, and conquering nature. Follow the Canada's most skilled hunters and trappers, have a look at ultimate challenges they are taking. The hosts are Steve Ecklund, a nationally recognized archer with a reputation as a fair chase hunter; Joe Eppele, a proud conservationist, best at hunting, fishing, and foraging; Eric Gryba, a jack-of-all-trades- hunter, angler and wannabe grillmaster. Discover Canada's proud heritage of hunters and trappers.

programme.title: Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit
programme.desc: It's time to explore all hunting opportunities in certain Canadian territories. Greg Toogood and his friends are hunting in Albertan and Saskatchewan prairies and sharing their exciting experience with us. Pheasant hunting in Saskatchewan, a rare moose hunt in Alberta, a whitetail and elk, a massive black bear and many other hunting riches that the prairies have to offer.

programme.title: Quebec Countryside
programme.desc: Join hosts Alain Croteau and Jean Turcotte as they explore Quebec's beatutiful and diverse countryside in this hunting and fishing show, trying to catch the area's most sought-after animals.

programme.title: Wallhanger
programme.desc: Chad and Dana Wall are passionate about family, faith, and the outdoors, leading to Wallhanger TV being born out of this desire to be among God's creation with family and friends. Standing behind their beliefs is what makes Wallhanger TV different than other shows in the market.

programme.title: Cabela's Deer Gear TV
programme.desc: Cabela's DeerGearTV is the made for all those who love deer hunting! This nationally televised series looks at the gear, tactics, strategies, and stories involved with deer hunting. The team at DeerGearTV share the passion and addiction to explore a diverse range of products used, reviewed, and put to the test. Check out the show and you'll see a wide range of the latest products for deer hunting. This unique property allows manufacturers, industry personnel, and experts to provide their own personalized messages and demonstrations of their products and services as well as what others have tested in the field. With deer hunting gear reviews, whitetail management tips, herd management, advice on food plots, conservation, and so much more, check out DeerGearTV for all the latest gear, news, and information.

programme.title: Lumberjacks
programme.desc: Avid lumberjacks come together from across North America to test their strength, stamina, skills and sleight of hand in this lumberjack competition series.

programme.title: The Mark Peterson's: Expedition Series
programme.desc: Expedition Series takes viewers across the high seas and over the tallest peaks in search of the outdoor experiences that drive them. Hosted by Mark Peterson, the show goes beyond the trophies to the quest for something more, by plugging into the cultures and personalities that make these exotic locations so special. From Alaska to Pakistan and many more unique locations in between, Mark hunts for adventure and a deeper understanding of some of the most sought-after game species and challenging locations across the world. This up close and personal account of Mark's adventurous spirit breaks the mold, fusing travel, hunting and exploration like no series ever has.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors with Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Tim Sylvia and the Hit Squad travel across the United States in pursuit of the next target.

programme.title: Struttinbuck
programme.desc: Back in 2008, a group of guys formed Struttinbuck (SB). Along the way, team members were added, animal harvests were filmed using an artist eye, and a heritage of the outdoors was formulated. The local television show gained unprecedented momentum, specifically in their home state of Arkansas. Fan support is the driving force for their evolution. SB creatively captures each hunt, providing their viewers with an in-depth, "right there with you" feel. The crew takes pride in their "do-it-yourself" hunts generated from privately owned, leased or state properties.

programme.title: Quebec Countryside

programme.title: Canada Hunts West
programme.desc: After a special casting, skilled hunters from Canada have got a unique chance to run their own show. The hosts demonstrate their unbelievable hunting skills and lifehack on the land which they've hunted for years. Get inspired by their experience and receive some useful tips from those who grow up hunting with their parents, who have respect for animals, endless love and passion for hunting and fishing.

programme.title: Indian Point Camp's the Real Deal
programme.desc: Hunting adventures with a small group of outdoorsmen.

programme.title: Sport Fishing on the Fly
programme.desc: Sport Fishing On The Fly is a nationally broadcast fly-fishing television series, hosted by Don Freschi. The show is now filmed in high-definition, primarily on the pristine rivers and lakes of western Canada. Surrounded by beautiful mountain ranges and spectacular wildlife, Don shares his experiences, tips, and tricks as he fishes everything from fast moving rivers, to dead calm lakes, to vast open oceans. One of the most popular aspects of SFOTF is the fly tying segment On The Bench. Most episodes feature this segment which has Don tying both simple and complex flies and explaining the entire process in great detail, making it easy to follow along and replicate the effective patterns he features on the shows. Up until series 16, the show was co-hosted by Grant Fines. Grant brought his own perspective to the styles and techniques he and Don used to effectively catch fish for well over a decade. He also hosted a segment within the show called On The Technology which featured an in-dept

programme.title: Fatal Impact Outdoors
programme.desc: A group of dedicated young hunters who are passionate about the outdoors and who strive to help keep one of the greatest sports alive for future generations.

programme.title: Chassomaniak Next Generation
programme.desc: Chassomaniak emerged when Francois Ratte ( Chassomaniak ) and Mathieu Pouliot (3D hunting and fishing) have combined their talents to form a new succession in the industry of hunting and fishing in Quebec. The Next Generation ( Next Generation) took off. With breathtaking images, Impressive and humane scenes our two hunters have been able to implement in the domain and appear on television with more and more fans at each show.

programme.title: CCFR's Canada Down Range
programme.desc: Canada's first television program is exclusively dedicated to sport shooting, target shooting and the myriad of sports that Canadians engage in. Sport shooting is one the most exciting sports in Canada. Discover the coolest events, the best locations and the most interesting people, the kinds of sports that anyone can participate in. Target shooting is mostly done with hand guns and rifles, and thousands of Canadians use these types of firearms. The aim of the program is to develop the shooting sport and to get more people involved.

programme.title: The Ultimate Fishing Experience
programme.desc: Each episode is a new adventure with some of the best anglers in the sport. The Ultimate Fishing Experience is full of tips, tricks, and general fishing knowledge from the best.

programme.title: DSC's Trailing the Hunter's Moon
programme.desc: The hunting community have got another chance to celebrate hunting lifestyle. Lifelong outdoorsmen, Blake Barnett and Larry Weishuhn experience the challenges of pursuing big game in various parts of the world, such as whitetail, the Pronghorn Antelope, the coastal brown bear, big water buffalo, you name it.

programme.title: Grilling with Gryba
programme.desc: Grilling with Gryba is a culinary program hosted by Eric Gryba. His two passions are grilling and cooking, though he admits he is not a professional, but he is constantly learning through endless experiments. He takes us on a fascinating culinary journey with the same enthusiasm that he hits the ice, as he is a professional hockey player, and with the same passion he hunts. He is a huge fan of healthy eating, that is why he hunts and goes fishing and than cooks mouth-watering dishes.

programme.title: Trigger Time
programme.desc: Trigger Time TV is a television show that brings together firearms professionals from across the United States to provide the highest level of firearms training and information to firearms enthusiasts across the country. We truly have an All Star roster of firearms professionals. Take a few minutes and review our show, our hosts, and how you can be a part of our television show. We are currently looking for products and services to highlight on television.

programme.title: Pure Instinct Outdoors
programme.desc: Pure Instinct Outdoors is a group of passionate hunters capturing their hunting adventures. Showing their ups and downs in every season.

programme.title: Land of Whitetail
programme.desc: Land of Whitetail is a hunting TV show that can boost your knowledge about responsible habitat management and hunting strategies. It covers in-depth topics about how and where to hunt deer along with how whitetails affect the landscape. The show is hosted by Dan Schmidt, Steve Bartylla, Mark Kayser, who have many years of hunting experience on public and private lands across the country. Find out about trophy buck hunting strategies and how to improve your land's nutritional potential through careful agricultural practices.

programme.title: Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit
programme.desc: It's time to explore all hunting opportunities in certain Canadian territories. Greg Toogood and his friends are hunting in Albertan and Saskatchewan prairies and sharing their exciting experience with us. Pheasant hunting in Saskatchewan, a rare moose hunt in Alberta, a whitetail and elk, a massive black bear and many other hunting riches that the prairies have to offer.

programme.title: Rawhide Hunting
programme.desc: Rawhide is a series that chronicles the unforgettable journey of big game hunting in Canada. Rawhide not only showcases talented hunters but tells the story of a tight-knit group of family and friends making memories and taking chances. Go on this adventure with co-hosts Jordan Walsh and Brad Kile as they celebrate epic kills, and navigate life's inevitable defeats in their quest to take life by the horns.

programme.title: Hitmen
programme.desc: From one end of the country to the other, the different teams within the hitmen show will keep your interest by showing you multiple hunts, by multiple people, in multiple parts of the country.

programme.title: Bone Cold TV
programme.desc: Bone Cold TV, an outdoor show following the dreams of 3 guys from small towns in Western New York along with their friends and family. Not only are they chasing adventure in their backyards, but chasing game and seeking adventure around the world!

programme.title: Bear Whisperer Returns
programme.desc: With the main focus on black bear conservation, wildlife specialist Steve Searles talks about bears in Mammoth Lakes, including why it's important not to feed them and what to do if you encounter a bear. He draws viewers' attention to bear safety in the backcountry. This documentary follows the professional bear wrangler as he uses peaceful means to ensure that humans and bears can co-exist. This man is on an important mission to save bears and at the same time, protect humans.

programme.title: Deer & Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Launched in 2005, Deer & Deer Hunting TV is still the preeminent program where deer are the stars of the show. This is the thinking whitetail hunter's TV show, featuring in-depth deer behavior, biology and hunting insights from hosts Dan Schmidt, Gordy Krahn, Steve Bartylla, Mark Kayser and hunters like you. Schmidt, Krahn, Bartylla and Kayser have more than 150 years combined hunting experience on public and private lands across the country. If you hunt in the public forest and hope to bring home freezer meat or on private land you've intensely managed for big bucks, these four veteran hunters have done it, too. Their years of triumphs and failures are expressed in Deer & Deer Hunting TV because they know what you're going through and want to know about. It's not just hunting, either, although Deer & Deer Hunting TV offers some great hunting footage. You'll also get comprehensive and practical insights into hunting strategy, white-tailed deer biology, research, behavior, technology in

programme.title: Outdoor Quest TV
programme.desc: Outdoor Quest TV is Canada's hunting series hosted by T.J. Schwanky and Vanessa Harrop. Both of the hosts are real hunters and they go on real hunts, so there are no scenarios of the show prepared beforehand. For them the hunting is all about the journey, it is their deep passion and a perfect opportunity to immerse in cultures around the globe. Both of them are obsessed with Africa, but they consider Canada and its incredible hunting opportunities the best.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Westcoast Sporting Journal is a west coast television series dedicated to both gear and fly techniques for chrome bright steelhead, salmon, trout and offshore species providing the hottest saltwater and freshwater fishing destinations each week with detailed instruction needed to succeed as an angler.

programme.title: American Airgunner
programme.desc: Big game hunting like never before in the worldwide competition with a big cash prize. Airgun sport shooters have several challenges to win for a chance to become the Champion, the title all the world's top airgunners are fighting for.

programme.title: Deer and Wildlife Stories
programme.desc: Keith Warren is an icon in the outdoor industry, a devoted conservationist and host of the show. Keith is for sure the countries most remarkable deer farmer, and the show entirely focuses on the deer farming industry. Keith showcases one of countries family farms. These farmers share their farming success stories with the audience as they embrace the rural lifestyle that so many Americans are searching for.

programme.title: Claudio Ongaro's Hired to Hunt
programme.desc: Hired to Hunt is about reality at the Ongaro Waterfowl Lodge and the TV show that delivers it to you.It portrays a behind the scenes look at outfitting.

programme.title: Carnivore
programme.desc: CARNIVORE TV is shooting the 7th season now and is hosted by Gary Roberson. Follow Gary as he predator and hound hunts across the US. Carnivore's cinematic format takes predator hunting to the next level. Carnivore is also the only show that will specifically cater to predator and hound hunters.

programme.title: Coyote Country
programme.desc: Have a look at coyote hunting in the western United States. Husband, wife and son are hunting together. The main target is coyote, but the family goes after other animals as well, like black bear, horned sheep, moose and many more. Follow the run of events and get some useful tips, strategies and advice on how to make your hunting more successful. Enjoy the hunting adventures and witness success and failures of the complex demanding hunting process.

programme.title: The American Way
programme.desc: The American Way TV is a high energy outdoor adventure ride , that is also a salute to all the blue collar men and women who work hard everyday and play even harder !!! Each week we will air exciting hunts , product tips as well as a Blue Collar Spotlight on a hardworking American and send out a big thank you for going to work and being the engine for our country !!! From Union tradesman to American Farmers , we will find them and thank them for going to work and doing thier job .... Because that is The American Way !!!!

programme.title: Fishful Thinking
programme.desc: Perfect for both the novice and experienced angler, Fishful Thinking provides entertaining insight for all audiences. Locations center around the heavily fished, public waters that are easily accessible for the majority of anglers.

programme.title: Destination Polaris
programme.desc: Grab your helmet and head for the trail. Destination Polaris is a program all about the passions of America's ATV & UTV riders. From diehard riders to weekend warriors, Destination Polaris is your authority on all terrain vehicles.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Featuring a large range of content, Americana Outdoors showcases a variety of top destinations, conservation messages, the latest in products, and some of the nation's top anglers and hunters, while providing the viewing audience with both entertainment and education in every episode. Every season, viewers have become accustomed to seeing coverage of exciting whitetail hunts, bugling elk, gobbling turkeys and wing shooting. Also viewers experience top level fishing events nationwide as well as being treated to fishing action featuring bass, redfish, walleye, tuna and more, all of which make up Americana Outdoors® presented by Garmin.

programme.title: Hitmen
programme.desc: From one end of the country to the other, the different teams within the hitmen show will keep your interest by showing you multiple hunts, by multiple people, in multiple parts of the country.

programme.title: Dirt Trax Television
programme.desc: Dirt Trax Television takes a unique slant on the sport by covering not only the excitement of the vehicles, but also by capturing the passion and experiential magnetism of riding ATVs and side-x-sides with amazing coverage of related activities surrounding these vehicles. Each episode of Dirt Trax Television features in-depth reviews of the latest ATVs and side-by-side off-road vehicles, destination guides comprised of spectacular scenery, in-shop technical upgrades and maintenance features, instruction on responsible riding practices discussion of open land access issues along with human interest stories from the exciting world of off-road adventure.

programme.title: Hollywood Hunter
programme.desc: The goal with the Hollywood Hunter Series is to educate others with conservation methods along with teaching the giving back approach to hunting.

programme.title: Trapping Inc.
programme.desc: Trapping Inc is the smash hit Canadian TV series that follows northern Alberta trappers Rich and Sandi Mellon's life on the trapline in the Canadian wilderness. The Scuttlebutt Podcast is the back story or inside scoop into their lives and the personalities, companies, products and issues that shape modern trapping. Rich and Sandi have been married for 40 years and have a cheerful approach to life that shows in their dedication to education, conservation and concern for the management and future of trapping.

programme.title: Chassomaniak Next Generation
programme.desc: Chassomaniak emerged when Francois Ratte ( Chassomaniak ) and Mathieu Pouliot (3D hunting and fishing) have combined their talents to form a new succession in the industry of hunting and fishing in Quebec. The Next Generation ( Next Generation) took off. With breathtaking images, Impressive and humane scenes our two hunters have been able to implement in the domain and appear on television with more and more fans at each show.

programme.title: How to Hunt with Ryan Kohler
programme.desc: An unedited raw hunting show, where Ryan puts the viewers "in the moment" as it unfolds LIVE on camera. Ryan is an expert hunter, co-founder of Wild TV Inc. in 2004, which is Canada's first and only nationwide hunting, fishing and outdoor adventure television network. Ryan stalks animals in real time and shares that, by doing so he manages to connect with the viewers in a way they have never been able to experience on a hunting show before.

programme.desc: Welcome To USOC Adventures TV. Our mission is to send you the viewer to places you have never been, and doing something you can only dream about.

programme.title: Fatal Impact Outdoors
programme.desc: A group of dedicated young hunters who are passionate about the outdoors and who strive to help keep one of the greatest sports alive for future generations.

programme.title: Quebec Countryside
programme.desc: Join hosts Alain Croteau and Jean Turcotte as they explore Quebec's beatutiful and diverse countryside in this hunting and fishing show, trying to catch the area's most sought-after animals.

programme.title: Canadian Sportfishing
programme.desc: Canadian Sportfishing show is Canada's leader in promoting sportfishing and educating anglers all over the world. The host is Italo Labignan, who is the proud founder of this sport fishing TV series that combines conservation and education with entertaining fishing action. Anglers and outdoor enthusiasts can get numerous tricks, special techniques and secret skills to catch more fish as Italo is a perfect mentor, respected for promoting responsible conservation practices.

programme.title: Reel West Coast
programme.desc: Reel West Coast is an exciting new cinematic lifestyle fishing show focusing on culture, conservation and the true West Coast experience.

programme.title: Claudio Ongaro's Hired to Hunt
programme.desc: Hired to Hunt is about reality at the Ongaro Waterfowl Lodge and the TV show that delivers it to you.It portrays a behind the scenes look at outfitting.

programme.title: The Dimestore Fishermen
programme.desc: Jim Hoey is the creator of The Dimestore Fishermen outdoor TV program being filmed in Canada. Jim is world renowned as an explorer, fisher and journalist. The program focuses on the cultural, historical and recreational aspects and fishing vibes of the region or municipality that the host and his crew are visiting. They are eager to demonstrate great Canadian communities to international audience and show all of its beauty and splendor.

programme.title: The Ultimate Fishing Experience
programme.desc: Each episode is a new adventure with some of the best anglers in the sport. The Ultimate Fishing Experience is full of tips, tricks, and general fishing knowledge from the best.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born combines The American Legend that is Winchester with a natural born passion for all things hunting! Each week, follow along with the Drury Outdoors Team as they chase everything from song dogs to warm blooded whitetails! The passion for hunting is hard to duplicate, a feeling that is nearly impossible to match.

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: Captivating, action-packed documentary series in which host, car enthusiast Stacey David, does vehicle make-overs and transformations, builds of custom vehicles, how-to demonstrations, while he shares history lessons on rare and interesting autos, and provides the audience with some simple tips and tricks they can use on their vehicles. The types of vehicles David works on range from muscle cars to hot rods, to trucks and bikes- or just about anything else that has an engine and some way to steer it. Going by his motto- ''Get out there and build something'', David takes his viewers through the practical steps involved in each of his projects, so they can do something similar in their garages.

programme.title: Motorz
programme.desc: Motorz is hosted by Chris Duke. Unlike other automotive shows that skip important steps during commercial breaks, use expensive tools, or perform feats that would be impossible for the average viewer, Motorz shows viewers how to confidently and properly maintain a vehicle and install aftermarket accessories with simple step-by-step instructions in a home garage environment.

programme.title: The Breaking Point
programme.desc: After a hard fought archery season, Andy hangs up the prime and grabs the rifle.

programme.title: Lindy's Fish Ed
programme.desc: Hosted by longtime fishing guide and veteran ice angler Jon Thelen, Fish Ed delivers a full eight weeks of shows geared to the hardwater crowd. He will be sharing the latest guide-tested tips, tricks and tactics to help viewers put more walleyes, panfish and pike on the ice on lakes across the Midwest.

programme.title: DSC's Trailing the Hunter's Moon
programme.desc: The hunting community have got another chance to celebrate hunting lifestyle. Lifelong outdoorsmen, Blake Barnett and Larry Weishuhn experience the challenges of pursuing big game in various parts of the world, such as whitetail, the Pronghorn Antelope, the coastal brown bear, big water buffalo, you name it.

programme.title: The Mark Peterson's: Expedition Series
programme.desc: Expedition Series takes viewers across the high seas and over the tallest peaks in search of the outdoor experiences that drive them. Hosted by Mark Peterson, the show goes beyond the trophies to the quest for something more, by plugging into the cultures and personalities that make these exotic locations so special. From Alaska to Pakistan and many more unique locations in between, Mark hunts for adventure and a deeper understanding of some of the most sought-after game species and challenging locations across the world. This up close and personal account of Mark's adventurous spirit breaks the mold, fusing travel, hunting and exploration like no series ever has.

programme.title: The High Road with Keith Warren
programme.desc: Keith Warren is an expert hunter. With his wide knowledge of the wilderness and his first-class hunting skills he is a feared predator in the wild. In this series he travels across North America and showcases his ability to scout and track wild animals. From his expert how to's to tips on tracking and shooting the series is a must watch for aspiring hunters and outdoorsmen alike. Whether it's deer, hogs, bear or birds, Keith has hunted it all, and is a master with all types of guns, rifles or pistols.

programme.title: CCFR's Canada Down Range
programme.desc: Canada's first television program is exclusively dedicated to sport shooting, target shooting and the myriad of sports that Canadians engage in. Sport shooting is one the most exciting sports in Canada. Discover the coolest events, the best locations and the most interesting people, the kinds of sports that anyone can participate in. Target shooting is mostly done with hand guns and rifles, and thousands of Canadians use these types of firearms. The aim of the program is to develop the shooting sport and to get more people involved.

programme.title: Struttinbuck
programme.desc: Back in 2008, a group of guys formed Struttinbuck (SB). Along the way, team members were added, animal harvests were filmed using an artist eye, and a heritage of the outdoors was formulated. The local television show gained unprecedented momentum, specifically in their home state of Arkansas. Fan support is the driving force for their evolution. SB creatively captures each hunt, providing their viewers with an in-depth, "right there with you" feel. The crew takes pride in their "do-it-yourself" hunts generated from privately owned, leased or state properties.

programme.title: The Flush
programme.desc: "The Flush" WILL make your heart thump! This new show takes upland hunting and the work of Pheasants Forever to new heights on the Outdoor Channel. Emmy award-winning hosts Bill Sherck and Ron Schara team up to guide viewers on some of North America's most profound and most exciting hunts. Each trip highlights the work and dedication of Pheasants Forever supporters and promotes the mission of the nation's most efficient conservation organization. Be prepared to be surprised! "The Flush" documents bird hunts like you've never seen before!

programme.title: Deer and Wildlife Stories
programme.desc: Keith Warren is an icon in the outdoor industry, a devoted conservationist and host of the show. Keith is for sure the countries most remarkable deer farmer, and the show entirely focuses on the deer farming industry. Keith showcases one of countries family farms. These farmers share their farming success stories with the audience as they embrace the rural lifestyle that so many Americans are searching for.

programme.title: Canada Hunts West
programme.desc: After a special casting, skilled hunters from Canada have got a unique chance to run their own show. The hosts demonstrate their unbelievable hunting skills and lifehack on the land which they've hunted for years. Get inspired by their experience and receive some useful tips from those who grow up hunting with their parents, who have respect for animals, endless love and passion for hunting and fishing.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak explores the intersection of science, hunters, fisherman, conservation and wildlife. The TV episodes correspond with the popular Gamekeepers podcast. Listen each week for a deeper dive. The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak Podcast. Toxey Haas, Bobby Cole, Lannie Wallace and Dudley Phelps have over 150 years combined experience in the outdoors with variety of diverse interests and bring an honest curiosity plus plenty of questions and insight. We are constantly searching for wildlife warriors and love telling their stories. However, we have a very diverse podcast guest offering that have included top university researchers like Dr. Mike Chamberlain to comedian Jeff Foxworthy and fisherman such as Kevin Vandam. Join us and understand why folks say Gamekeepers is their favorite podcast and television show.

programme.title: Claudio Ongaro's Hired to Hunt
programme.desc: Hired to Hunt is about reality at the Ongaro Waterfowl Lodge and the TV show that delivers it to you.It portrays a behind the scenes look at outfitting.

programme.title: Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit
programme.desc: It's time to explore all hunting opportunities in certain Canadian territories. Greg Toogood and his friends are hunting in Albertan and Saskatchewan prairies and sharing their exciting experience with us. Pheasant hunting in Saskatchewan, a rare moose hunt in Alberta, a whitetail and elk, a massive black bear and many other hunting riches that the prairies have to offer.

programme.title: Guns & Gear
programme.desc: On Guns & Gear, co-hosts Tom Gresham and Ryan Gresham showcase the newest, hottest, and coolest guns, optics, ammo, lights, lasers, and accessories in what has become America's top gear-oriented show about firearms.

programme.title: Bone Cold TV
programme.desc: Bone Cold TV, an outdoor show following the dreams of 3 guys from small towns in Western New York along with their friends and family. Not only are they chasing adventure in their backyards, but chasing game and seeking adventure around the world!

programme.title: The American Way
programme.desc: The American Way TV is a high energy outdoor adventure ride , that is also a salute to all the blue collar men and women who work hard everyday and play even harder !!! Each week we will air exciting hunts , product tips as well as a Blue Collar Spotlight on a hardworking American and send out a big thank you for going to work and being the engine for our country !!! From Union tradesman to American Farmers , we will find them and thank them for going to work and doing thier job .... Because that is The American Way !!!!

programme.title: The Mark Peterson's: Expedition Series
programme.desc: Expedition Series takes viewers across the high seas and over the tallest peaks in search of the outdoor experiences that drive them. Hosted by Mark Peterson, the show goes beyond the trophies to the quest for something more, by plugging into the cultures and personalities that make these exotic locations so special. From Alaska to Pakistan and many more unique locations in between, Mark hunts for adventure and a deeper understanding of some of the most sought-after game species and challenging locations across the world. This up close and personal account of Mark's adventurous spirit breaks the mold, fusing travel, hunting and exploration like no series ever has.

programme.title: Guns & Gear
programme.desc: On Guns & Gear, co-hosts Tom Gresham and Ryan Gresham showcase the newest, hottest, and coolest guns, optics, ammo, lights, lasers, and accessories in what has become America's top gear-oriented show about firearms.

programme.title: Deer and Wildlife Stories
programme.desc: Keith Warren is an icon in the outdoor industry, a devoted conservationist and host of the show. Keith is for sure the countries most remarkable deer farmer, and the show entirely focuses on the deer farming industry. Keith showcases one of countries family farms. These farmers share their farming success stories with the audience as they embrace the rural lifestyle that so many Americans are searching for.

programme.title: Wallhanger
programme.desc: Chad and Dana Wall are passionate about family, faith, and the outdoors, leading to Wallhanger TV being born out of this desire to be among God's creation with family and friends. Standing behind their beliefs is what makes Wallhanger TV different than other shows in the market.

programme.title: Destination Polaris
programme.desc: Grab your helmet and head for the trail. Destination Polaris is a program all about the passions of America's ATV & UTV riders. From diehard riders to weekend warriors, Destination Polaris is your authority on all terrain vehicles.

programme.title: The American Way
programme.desc: The American Way TV is a high energy outdoor adventure ride , that is also a salute to all the blue collar men and women who work hard everyday and play even harder !!! Each week we will air exciting hunts , product tips as well as a Blue Collar Spotlight on a hardworking American and send out a big thank you for going to work and being the engine for our country !!! From Union tradesman to American Farmers , we will find them and thank them for going to work and doing thier job .... Because that is The American Way !!!!

programme.title: USOC Adventures
programme.desc: Welcome To USOC Adventures TV. Our mission is to send you the viewer to places you have never been, and doing something you can only dream about.

programme.title: Cabela's Deer Gear TV
programme.desc: Cabela's DeerGearTV is the made for all those who love deer hunting! This nationally televised series looks at the gear, tactics, strategies, and stories involved with deer hunting. The team at DeerGearTV share the passion and addiction to explore a diverse range of products used, reviewed, and put to the test. Check out the show and you'll see a wide range of the latest products for deer hunting. This unique property allows manufacturers, industry personnel, and experts to provide their own personalized messages and demonstrations of their products and services as well as what others have tested in the field. With deer hunting gear reviews, whitetail management tips, herd management, advice on food plots, conservation, and so much more, check out DeerGearTV for all the latest gear, news, and information.

programme.title: Canadian Sportfishing
programme.desc: Canadian Sportfishing show is Canada's leader in promoting sportfishing and educating anglers all over the world. The host is Italo Labignan, who is the proud founder of this sport fishing TV series that combines conservation and education with entertaining fishing action. Anglers and outdoor enthusiasts can get numerous tricks, special techniques and secret skills to catch more fish as Italo is a perfect mentor, respected for promoting responsible conservation practices.

programme.title: Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit
programme.desc: It's time to explore all hunting opportunities in certain Canadian territories. Pheasant hunting in Saskatchewan, a rare moose hunt in Alberta, a whitetail and elk, a massive black bear and many other hunting riches that the prairies have to offer.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andrew and Michelle Buchanan, brother and sister, share their deep knowledge on the wildlife habits and habitats in documentary series This Is Africa. They show their unbelievable skills in hunting and fishing on the African Continent. Thanks to their deep understanding of local people, they take clients to the best areas for the trophies they want to get, and help them to fulfill their hunting dreams. This is Africa demonstrates the truth about conservation through hunting.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born combines The American Legend that is Winchester with a natural born passion for all things hunting! Each week, follow along with the Drury Outdoors Team as they chase everything from song dogs to warm blooded whitetails! The passion for hunting is hard to duplicate, a feeling that is nearly impossible to match.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Featuring a large range of content, Americana Outdoors showcases a variety of top destinations, conservation messages, the latest in products, and some of the nation's top anglers and hunters, while providing the viewing audience with both entertainment and education in every episode. Every season, viewers have become accustomed to seeing coverage of exciting whitetail hunts, bugling elk, gobbling turkeys and wing shooting. Also viewers experience top level fishing events nationwide as well as being treated to fishing action featuring bass, redfish, walleye, tuna and more, all of which make up Americana Outdoors® presented by Garmin.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Westcoast Sporting Journal is a west coast television series dedicated to both gear and fly techniques for chrome bright steelhead, salmon, trout and offshore species providing the hottest saltwater and freshwater fishing destinations each week with detailed instruction needed to succeed as an angler.

programme.title: Canada Hunts West
programme.desc: After a special casting, skilled hunters from Canada have got a unique chance to run their own show. The hosts demonstrate their unbelievable hunting skills and lifehack on the land which they've hunted for years. Get inspired by their experience and receive some useful tips from those who grow up hunting with their parents, who have respect for animals, endless love and passion for hunting and fishing.

programme.title: Oshi no Ko: The Final Act
The Adventurer: The Curse of the Midas Box
In the Absence of Good Men
I Will Follow You Into the Dark
Love Sick: Secrets of a Sex Addict
Вади ножовете
programme.desc: Семейство, опечалено след самоубийството на своя патриарх, с ужас научава, че той е оставил цялото си богатство на своята болногледачка и че всъщност е бил убит. Тъй като не искат да й позволят да прибере всичко, семейството наема прочут детектив (Даниел Крейг), който да разреши загадката и да открие КОЙ ГО Е НАПРАВИЛ? Модерен поглед към класическия детективски жанр.

programme.title: Чeрна дупка
programme.desc: По време на експеримент учени случайно създават черна дупка. Докато я изследват, двама от тях загиват, а армията, начело с генерал Райкър, нахлува в лабораторията им. Повикан е известния доктор Брайс, който разбира, че експериментът е пуснал на свобода същество, което се храни с енергия. Ръководството иска ядрена атака срещу съществото, но Брайс предупреждава, че това ще увеличи черната дупка.

programme.title: Лесна услуга
programme.desc: Стефани е самотна майка, която се сприятелява с Емили - потайна жена от висшата класа. Когато Емили изчезва, Стефани се чувства длъжна да я потърси.

programme.title: Престъпления без граници
programme.desc: В наказателното право са нужни твърди доказателства, а социалното право много често се задоволява с лично мнение. Екипът има лично мнение, но нещата се обръщат доста неочаквано. Дали "Лигата на справедливостта на жертвите" е толкова невинна, колкото твърди нейния лидер? Наистина ли са виновни хората от неговия списък? И, ако е така, трябва ли екипът да се опита да ги защити?

programme.title: Престъпления без граници
programme.desc: Случаят с намушкване на остров обикновено е важен само за жертвата. Но, когато тази жертва умира от смъртоносна заразна болест, тогава нещата са съвсем различни. Докато екипът се опитва да разкрие опит за убийство и безмилостно отвличане, те правят плашещо откритие. Мъртвият мъж е един от похитителите, мъжът, който го намушква е баща на жертвата, а сега той е опръскан със заразена кръв и носи не само пари за откуп.

programme.title: 16 пресечки
programme.desc: Джак Моузли е уморено ченге, поело незавидната задача да ескортира бъбрив обвиняем от затвора до съда, намиращ се на 16 пресечки. По пътя той научава, че обвиняемият ще свидетелства срещу неговите колеги, и цялата нюйоркска полиция го иска мъртъв. Моузли ще трябва да избира между лоялността към колегите си и опазването на свидетеля. Никога едно такова кратко разстояние не е било толкова дълго.

programme.title: Мавританецът
programme.desc: Мохамеду Улд Слахи - един от най-дълго лежалите затворници в Гуантанамо, заподозрян за съучастник в терористичните атаки от 11 септември 2001 г., се бори за свобода, след като бил задържан и лишен от свобода в продължение на години без обвинение от правителството на САЩ.

programme.title: Анон
programme.desc: Историята се развива в бъдещето в съветски стил, където правителството се опитва да се бори с престъпността, като елиминира личния живот чрез наблюдение и фактическа автоцензура. Полицай Сал Фриланд (Клайв Оуен) е печено ченге, което дава всичко от себе си в битката срещу престъпността в своя град. Но ситуацията рязко се променя, когато той среща хакерка, позната като Момичето (Аманда Сейфрид).

programme.title: Леговището на лъва
programme.desc: Унгарец от ромски произход, работещ за руски мафиот, става двоен агент на ФБР.

programme.title: Възкресените
programme.desc: Мъртвите постепенно излизат на бял свят, но не могат да продължат нормалния си живот. Камий отхвърля Фредерик, а Симон се разделя с Адел и Клои, след като Томас го застрелва при самозащита. Виктор се скита наоколо, търсейки своя убиец. Жюли започва да изпитва съмнения: ами ако и тя е мъртва? Лена бива лекувана от сериен убиец, който се опитва да държи под контрол убийствените си пориви.

programme.title: Студени пари
programme.desc: Дошли в Лас Вегас за бърз развод, бившо ченге и съпругата му влизат в казиното, управлявано от съмнителния Чарлз Атлас. Те печелят голяма сума пари точно в момента, когато казиното е обрано. Полицията смята, че техният голям джакпот е само прикритие и ги заподозира. Същата вечер и на следващата сутрин, двамата се опитват да избягат от обсаденото казино, да докажат своята невинност и да спасят брака си.

programme.title: Програмна пауза
programme.desc: Програмна пауза на канал CineStar TV Action&Thriller.

programme.title: Лесна услуга
programme.desc: Стефани е самотна майка, която се сприятелява с Емили - потайна жена от висшата класа. Когато Емили изчезва, Стефани се чувства длъжна да я потърси.

programme.title: Горският войн
programme.desc: Джон Маккена е духовен пазител с дарбата да се превръща в мечка, вълк или орел. Той живее в горите на Тангълууд и е посветил живота си на опазването им. Когато група безскрупулни дървосекачи, начело с Травис Торн идва, за да изсече всичко, Маккена обединява сили с "Господарите на Тангълууд" - група деца, които обичат да играят в гората - и повежда битка за спасяването на гората.

programme.title: 16 пресечки
programme.desc: Джак Моузли е уморено ченге, поело незавидната задача да ескортира бъбрив обвиняем от затвора до съда, намиращ се на 16 пресечки. По пътя той научава, че обвиняемият ще свидетелства срещу неговите колеги, и цялата нюйоркска полиция го иска мъртъв. Моузли ще трябва да избира между лоялността към колегите си и опазването на свидетеля. Никога едно такова кратко разстояние не е било толкова дълго.

programme.title: Обикновени мечти
programme.desc: През погледа на двама тийнейджъри филмът изследва отчаянието от живота, бягството от дома и красотата на първата любов.

programme.title: Как да възпреш крадец
programme.desc: В запустял град в Северен Уисконсин една упорита млада жена и нейният наивен приятел се изправят срещу двама крадци аматьори.

programme.title: Престъпления без граници
programme.desc: Жена успява да се измъкне от лапите на неуловимия търговец на бели роби Браник Тисо и изглежда, че екипът най-накрая ще успее да го хване. Разследването е във върховната си точка и се разкриват още по-тъмни подробности. Ако милиардерът и филантроп Алонсо Каро е враг номер едно на трафика на хора, защо тогава е посетил частен секс клуб в Австрия? Какво не знае местната полиция за престъпленията в собствения им двор?

programme.title: Престъпления без граници
programme.desc: Контрабандният ядрен материал е кошмар, който може да причини огромна катастрофа. Екипът е по следите на пратка, а в случая се намесва арогантен старши следовател. Те трябва да разберат какво е свързано с пратката - тероризъм, изнудване или просто полудял политик, който иска да стане сензационна новина. Какво правят, когато открият отговора? Старшият следовател вече е взел решение за това - но дали е правилно?

programme.title: Кин
programme.desc: Наскоро освободен бивш мошеник и неговият осиновен брат тийнейджър са принудени да бягат. Единствената им защита е високотехнологично оръжие с мистериозен произход.

programme.title: Хелбой
programme.desc: Хелбой се завръща неудържимо. В тази наситена с екшън история легендарният супергерой полудемон (Дейвид Харбър), е призован в английската провинция, за да се пребори с трима безчинстващи великани. Той среща Кървавата кралица Нимуе (Мила Йовович), възкръснала древна вещица, жадна за отмъщение за предателство от миналото. Сега той трябва да спре Нимуе на всяка цена, без да предизвика края на света.

programme.title: Идеалният мъж
programme.desc: След болезнена раздяла, една жена среща мъж, който изглежда идеален за нея. Докато връзката им се развива, обаче, тя разбира, че той е бивш наемен убиец. Тяхната нова, но истинска връзка, е подложена на изпитание още повече, докато двамата се опитват да се спасят от тъмното му минало, което се е върнало, за да го преследва.

programme.title: Луната на ловеца
programme.desc: Семейство Дилейни се премества от големия град в тиха селска къща, където г-н и г-жа Дилейни решават да предпазят трите си тийнейджърки от клопките, които животът в града може да донесе. Домът им е прекрасен, рустикален, и е всичко, за което са си мечтали, включително и големите ябълкови градини. Но те не знаят, че не всичко е такова, каквото изглежда. Нещо много истинско и зловещо броди из тези градини. Сега е спокойно, но това нещо вече е убивало брутално — и ще убие отново. След като се настаняват, г-н и г-жа Делани заминават в командировка, оставяйки дъщерите си сами. В началото момичетата са развълнувани, че няма да бъдат наблюдавани от родителите си, и дори са готови да се позабавляват, когато няколко местни момчета ги посещават. Но забавлението е кратко. Нещата излизат извън контрол, тъй като момчетата не приемат отказ. Ще успеят ли момичетата да се спасят?

programme.title: Възкресените
programme.desc: Целият град остава без ток. Пиер формира общност около Камий, която сега се възприема като един вид "пророчица". След като е "убит" от Томас, Симон оживява и заминава с мистериозната Люси. Жюли, заедно с Виктор, чието тяло се обезобразява, намира убежище в къщата на Лора. Лена се сближава със Серж, но трябва да избяга обратно в града.

programme.title: Кадилакът на Долан
programme.desc: В Лас Вегас съпрузите Робинсън и Елизабет правят опити за бебе. Една вечер, докато е на езда през пустинята, Елизабет става свидетел на екзекуцията на нелегален имигрант, извършена от трафиканта на хора Джими Долан, и решава да докладва за инцидента на полицията. Елизабет обаче губи мобилния си телефон, Долан го намира, проследява адреса й и я заплашва. Елизабет и Робинсън отиват във ФБР, които ги преместват в защитен дом под закрилата на двама агенти. Когато Елизабет се измъква от къщата, за да купи тест за бременност, колата й избухва и тя умира. Робинсън решава да отмъсти за смъртта й.

programme.title: Програмна пауза
programme.desc: Програмна пауза на канал CineStar TV Action&Thriller.

programme.title: Как да възпреш крадец
programme.desc: В запустял град в Северен Уисконсин една упорита млада жена и нейният наивен приятел се изправят срещу двама крадци аматьори.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: (2014)A band of pirates and a group of bandits fight to catch a gray whale that has swallowed a royal stamp.

programme.title: Cleopatra (1999) 1/2
programme.desc: Part 1. (1999)A woman of beauty, intelligence and exotic mystery, Cleopatra sets out to claim her throne as the rightful ruler of Egypt. Burdened by Egypt's debt to Rome and the betrayal of her brother, Ptolemy, and sister, Arsinoe, Cleopatra seeks assistance from the Roman Emperor, Caesar.

programme.title: Cleopatra (1999) 2/2
programme.desc: Part 2. (1999)After Caesar's death, Cleopatra turns to Mark Antony to save Egypt, and their alliance becomes a passionate affair that spirals into betrayal, war, and tragic downfall.

programme.title: Събудих се на 30
programme.desc: (2004)Unpopular schoolgirl Jenna Rink makes an unusual wish on her birthday. Miraculously, her wish comes true and the 13-year-old Jenna wakes up the next day as a 30-year-old woman.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: (2004)Peter Parker is beset with troubles in his failing personal life as he battles a former brilliant scientist named Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Лъжльото
programme.desc: (1997)A fast-track lawyer can't lie for 24 hours due to his son's birthday wish after disappointing him for the last time.

programme.title: Ван Хелсинг
programme.desc: (2004)The famed monster hunter is sent to Transylvania to stop Count Dracula, who is using Dr. Frankenstein's research and a werewolf for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Александър
programme.desc: (2004)Alexander, the King of Macedonia and one of the greatest army leaders in the history of warfare, conquers much of the known world.

programme.title: Заразно зло: Апокалипсис

programme.title: Hot Potato, The
programme.desc: (2012)London's East End 1969. Based on real events. Two chancers 'find' a lump of Uranium and crisscross Europe to find a buyer. Accompanied by Danny's girl,the lovely Carole. They encounter a diverse cast of bizarre characters, all trying to steal the 'Hot Potato', but a deal agreed inside the Vatican has the co-conspirators confounding each other. The story twists and turns to an exciting and unexpected finale.

programme.title: Poseidon Adventure, The 1/2
programme.desc: Part 1. (2005)A cruise ship succumbs to a terrorist act and capsizes on New Year's eve. A ragtag group of survivors, spearheaded by a Priest and a homeland security agent, must journey through the upside down vessel and attempt an escape.

programme.desc: (1991)When Robin and his Moorish companion come to England and the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham, he decides to fight back as an outlaw.

programme.title: Господин Боунс
programme.desc: (2001)A medicine man is sent looking for the son of his tribal king, and brings back an American golfer and a host of goons intent on keeping him in the golf tournament.

programme.title: Ghost Rider (2007)
programme.desc: (2007)When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: Fantomas
programme.desc: (1964)The best men of France. a brave journalist and an extremely energetic commissioner. attack the trail of a mysterious criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Луда бъркотия
programme.desc: (1980)Set up and wrongfully accused, two best friends will be sent to prison for a crime they didn't commit. However, no prison cell could keep them locked in.

programme.title: Жена назаем
programme.desc: (2011)On a weekend trip to Hawaii, a plastic surgeon convinces his loyal assistant to pose as his soon-to-be-divorced wife in order to cover up a careless lie he told to his much-younger girlfriend.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: (1990)When a man goes in to have virtual vacation memories of the planet Mars implanted in his mind, an unexpected and harrowing series of events forces him to go to the planet for real. or is he?

Burdened by Egypt's debt to Rome and the betrayal of her brother, Ptolemy, and sister, Arsinoe, Cleopatra seeks assistance from the Roman Emperor, Caesar.

programme.title: Cleopatra (1999) 2/2
programme.desc: Part 2. (1999)After Caesar's death, Cleopatra turns to Mark Antony to save Egypt, and their alliance becomes a passionate affair that spirals into betrayal, war, and tragic downfall.

programme.title: Ван Хелсинг
programme.desc: (2004)The famed monster hunter is sent to Transylvania to stop Count Dracula, who is using Dr. Frankenstein's research and a werewolf for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Приятелю, Тед 2

Здраве и красота
programme.desc: В рубриката " Здраве и Красота" се представят най-иновативните естетични и козметични процедури, както и последните тенденции в сферата на красотата.

programme.title: Семейно Време
programme.desc: Предаване за деца и родители, в което водещата Йоана Василева - Йоко провокира специалисти и родители в разговор да споделят професионална експертиза и личен опит по актуални проблеми.

programme.title: CodeMarket
programme.desc: От технологии и хранителни добавки до козметика, мода и лайфстайл предложения - "CodeMarket" е практичният навигатор в света на модерното пазаруване, който води зрителите през най-доброто от пазара с лекота, доверие и стил.

programme.title: Здравни репортажи
programme.desc: Най-доброто от медийното отразяване през годината.

programme.title: Healthy Morning
programme.desc: Сутрешен магазинен блок с полезни съвети, рецепти. Говорим по теми свързани със здравето, които вълнуват всеки. Водещ: Десислава Бошнакова

programme.title: CodeMarket
programme.desc: От технологии и хранителни добавки до козметика, мода и лайфстайл предложения - "CodeMarket" е практичният навигатор в света на модерното пазаруване, който води зрителите през най-доброто от пазара с лекота, доверие и стил.

programme.title: Активно без граници
programme.desc: Теми като предварителната подготовка и историята на всеки спорт са неделима част от предаването, а в тренировките ще се роди истината - подходящи ли са за самите нас?

programme.title: Здраве и красота
programme.desc: В рубриката " Здраве и Красота" се представят най-иновативните естетични и козметични процедури, както и последните тенденции в сферата на красотата.

programme.title: Иновации и технологии
programme.desc: Рубриката "Иновации и технологии" обръща внимание на новостите в сферата на здравеопазването. Форматът представя разработването и внедряването на информационни технологии и техника в медицината, здравеопазването и всеки спектър, засягащ повишаването на качеството на живот.

programme.title: Портрети на лекари
programme.desc: Рубрика,която дават насока в конкретна област в медицината.

programme.title: Sport REforma
programme.desc: Мисия на "Спорт РЕформа" е да покаже положителните реформи в професионалния спорт - към по-здравословни практики, да мотивира децата и младите да спортуват, а възрастните чрез спорта да открият път към здравето, хармонията, щастието и да влязат във форма с помощта на Спорт РЕформа.

programme.desc: Най-доброто от медийното отразяване през годината.

programme.title: Спешно отделение
programme.desc: Спешно отделение

programme.title: Жената в злато
programme.desc: Мария Алтман се опитва да си върне световноизвестна картина на леля си, открадната от нацистите по време на Втората световна война. Тя го прави не само, за да си върне това, което й се полага по право, но и за да получи някаква справедливост за смъртта, унищожението и масовата кражба на изкуство, извършени от нацистите.

programme.title: Академия за вампири
programme.desc: Роус Хатауей е наполовина вампир, наполовина човек. Тя е пазител на мороите - племе от смъртни вампири, които живеят в гората. Нейната задача е да ги предпази от кръвожадните безсмъртни стригои.

programme.title: Свободноизбираем предмет
programme.desc: Когато Джеси, 35-годишен съветник по приема в колеж от Ню Йорк, идва на празненството по случай пенсионирането на любимия му професор, той носи със себе си духа на студентските си години. Запознава се с 19-годишната Зиби, умна и красива студентка, и е изправен пред морална дилема - да продължи връзката със сродната си душа или да разбие сърцето ѝ и да се върне в "реалния свят"?

programme.title: Извън играта
programme.desc: През 1941 г. трима мъже се опитват да избягат от комунистическа Русия, бягайки от сибирски гулаг. Филмът разказва тяхната история и тази на други четирима, които са избягали с тях и тинейджърка, присъединила се с тях в бягството. Лидер на групата е Януш, поляк, осъден заради тормоз над жена си. Той е прекарал голяма част от младостта си на открито и знае как да живее в дивата природа.

programme.title: Страшен филм 5
programme.desc: Три танцьорки - една ветеранка и две новачки, които са най-добри приятелки, се борят за главната роля в нова продукция на надменен, властен, разгонен и самозабравил се режисьор.

programme.title: Опасен
programme.desc: Бившият затворник и поправил се социопат Дилън Форестър опитва да бъде кротък по време на срока на условното си освобождаване с помощта на обилто количество антидепресанти от своя ексцентричен психиатър. Въпреки това, когато брат му умира при мистериозни обстоятелства, Дилън нарушава условията на предсрочното освобождаване. С решителен агент на ФБР по следите му, Дилън тръгва да разкрие истината.

programme.title: Девет живота
programme.desc: Дийн Кейдж е бивш детектив от специалните сили, който се оказва в конфликт с правителството, на което преди е служил, когато е отвлечен от агенти на разузнаването. Те са го объркали с друг ветеран от специалните сили...За да държат под око заподозрения агент, хората от разузнаването дават на Кейдж специално контролиращо мозъка халюциногенно вещество, което им позволява да внедряват образи в мозъка му по тяхно желание. Сега Кейдж трябва да отсее реалното от миража в света около него, докато заедно с това се бори да докаже истинската си самоличност.

programme.title: Бош
programme.desc: След като открива, че Алварес е прехвърлен, Бош се обръща за помощ към началник Ървинг. Пиърс и Вега откриват следа към наемния убиец. Билетс се свързва с бивш холивудски полицай за информация относно Леонард и Норис. При срещата с Карл Роджърс, Едгар изпуска важен детайл за случая, което вбесява Бош.

programme.title: Стаята на разочарованията
programme.desc: Вдъхновен от истински събития, "Стаята на разочарованията" разказва историята на изпълнената с ужас среща на едно семейство и новият им дом. Търсейки ново начало, Дейна (Кейт Бекинсейл) и Дейвид, заедно с 5-годишния им син Джеръми, се местят на мечтаното място. Красива, стара, селска къща, на тавана на която има скрита, тайна стая. Когато плашещи и необясними събития карат Дейна да намери отдавна изгубения ключ от тази стая, тя научава множество тайни, които разкриват, че миналото на къщата е ужасяващо и свързано с нейното собствено.

programme.title: Програмна пауза
programme.desc: Програмна пауза на канал CineStar TV.

programme.title: Свободноизбираем предмет
programme.desc: Когато Джеси, 35-годишен съветник по приема в колеж от Ню Йорк, идва на празненството по случай пенсионирането на любимия му професор, той носи със себе си духа на студентските си години. Запознава се с 19-годишната Зиби, умна и красива студентка, и е изправен пред морална дилема - да продължи връзката със сродната си душа или да разбие сърцето ѝ и да се върне в "реалния свят"?

programme.title: Джъстин Бийбър: Вярвай
programme.desc: Поглед върху Джъстин Бийбър зад кулисите и на сцената по пътя му към върха.

programme.title: Лулу завинаги
programme.desc: Лулу Макафи живее в дом за възрастни с психични отклонения. Тя се свързва с Бен Клифтън, нейна стара любов, нещастно женен за психиатърката Клеър. Лулу казва на Бен, че имат син, роден след края на връзката им. Той казва на Клеър, че ще закара Лулу до Уисконсин, за да се срещне със сина си - посещение, за което Лулу твърди, че е уговорено. Наистина ли имат син? Какви емоционални бомби ще избухнат?

programme.title: Извън играта
programme.desc: През 1941 г. трима мъже се опитват да избягат от комунистическа Русия, бягайки от сибирски гулаг. Филмът разказва тяхната история и тази на други четирима, които са избягали с тях и тинейджърка, присъединила се с тях в бягството. Лидер на групата е Януш, поляк, осъден заради тормоз над жена си. Той е прекарал голяма част от младостта си на открито и знае как да живее в дивата природа.

programme.title: Моят ангел
programme.desc: Нуми Рапас (момичето с татуировка на дракон) играе ролята на на жена на ръба в този психологически трилър. Претърпяла трагична загуба години по-рано Лизи (Рапас) се опитва да изгради живота си отново, когато внезапно е обсебена от дъщерята на съседите, вярвайки, че момичето е нейното собствено дете. Докато шокиращите, заплашителни действия на Лизи стават все по-опасни, те водят до експлозивна конфронтация с ядосаната, отбранителна майка на момичето (Ивон Страховски, "Историята на слугинята").

programme.title: О, Канада
programme.desc: Тежко болният режисьор Леонард Файф иска да разкаже историята на живота си - без цензура, преди да е станало твърде късно. Като автор на високо оценени документални филми той има немалко поводи за гордост, но отказът му да воюва във Виетнам и миналите му връзки крият тежки истини. Когато Леонард застава пред камера в присъствието на съпругата си Ема, безцеремонните му признания за младото му "аз" постепенно разкриват човека зад мита.

programme.title: Преходът
programme.desc: След като среща загадъчен непознат, мъж трябва да избяга от дистопичен свят, за да се върне при съпругата си. Филмът е съвременно преразказване на "Книгата на Йов". Кевин Гарнър е разделен от Моли, любовта на живота си, когато загадъчна фигура, известна като Благодетеля, го изпраща в алтернативна дистопична реалност. Дали надеждата и вярата ще бъдат достатъчни, за да намери пътя обратно?

programme.title: Последното лице
programme.desc: Рен ръководи агенция за международна помощ в Африка. Там тя се запознава с лекаря Мигел Леон, с когото преминават през труден момент в обстановка на граждански вълнения и революция, а пламналата помежду им любов угасва.

programme.title: Пробив
programme.desc: Алис Расин (Нуми Рапас) води спокоен живот в Лондон. Алис е най-добрият разпитващ в ЦРУ, но не успява да накара един затворник да пропее навреме и да спаси живота на няколко души. Това я кара да напусне и да стане социален работник. Когато ЦРУ задържа заподозрян, за когото се смята, че има информация за предстояща терористична атака, Алис внезапно бива призована.

programme.title: Под един покрив
programme.desc: Томас е талантлив художник със самоубийствени наклонности, който - опитвайки да избяга от привилегированото си съществуване - отива в пустинята Мохаве, където се натъква на Джак. Скитникът-психопат е готов на всичко, за да се докопа до това, което Томас притежава. Стига се до изпълнен с насилие, екзистенциален сблъсък на две противоположности.

programme.title: Бош
programme.desc: След като участието на Мади в случая с Францен я излага на показ, тя трябва да свидетелства пред голямото жури, за да остане в безопасност. Ървинг моли Бренер от ФБР за помощ с Алварес. Бащата на момичето, загинало в пожара, посещава Бош; болката му засилва решимостта на Бош да изправи убийците пред съда. Леонард и Норис тласкат Билетс към ръба.

programme.title: Среднощна разходка
programme.desc: Чаровен сваляч, Франк няма намерение да се кротне. Но само до момента, в който в една изгаряща нощ не среща красивата и интелигентна арабка Сара. Те започват романтична връзка и Франк решава да предложи брак на Сара по време на пътуване до родната й страна. Една нощ в чужбина и корумпираната арабска полиция открива двойката в компрометираща ситуация. Те провокират инцидент, който ескалира.

programme.title: Програмна пауза
programme.desc: Програмна пауза на канал CineStar TV.

programme.title: О, Канада
programme.desc: Тежко болният режисьор Леонард Файф иска да разкаже историята на живота си - без цензура, преди да е станало твърде късно. Като автор на високо оценени документални филми той има немалко поводи за гордост, но отказът му да воюва във Виетнам и миналите му връзки крият тежки истини. Когато Леонард застава пред камера в присъствието на съпругата си Ема, безцеремонните му признания за младото му "аз" постепенно разкриват човека зад мита.
